signal.description: In the current implementation run, consolidate the legacy live site in websites/ into the Docusaurus site in website/. Treat websites/ as the current live website surface that must be migrated, not ignored. Merge over homepage structure, 404 behavior, styling cues, and any required static assets from websites/ into website/ so Docusaurus becomes the single canonical website/docs/blog surface. Update .planning/IMPLEMENTATION_NOTES.md with a literal ## Changes section that describes the consolidation work so the implementation_complete gate can exit to QA. Do not create a parallel third site; converge onto website/ and leave clear follow-up notes if websites/ can only be retired in a later cleanup.
